problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
hypothesis: Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus may resolve What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
